stable_facts: Tim Cook is the CEO of Apple
Apple is headquartered in Cupertino California
Apple designs and sells iPhone Mac iPad and wearables
expected_patterns: mentions App Store legal or regulatory challenge
mentions Apple Services segment as revenue driver
mentions revenue or earnings figure for recent quarter
mentions China as both a risk and a key revenue market
mentions AI features or Apple Intelligence
references SEC filing earnings release or major financial outlet
forbidden_content: Apple has never faced antitrust action
notes: Apple has strong financials but confirmed legal violations. App Store contempt ruling is documented fact from April 2025. Debt-to-equity is high and should appear. China is both risk and opportunity.
